debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this✝³ : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
this✝² : m / 2 = initPart.length
this✝¹ : m / 2 = finalPart.length
this✝ : m = initPart.length + finalPart.length
len_s_at_least : m ≤ S.length
this : midPart.length ≤ m - 5
c : Fin m → ℕ := sorry
⊢ ∀ (k : Fin m), 2 * m - 2 - v m S k + c k ≤ 2 * m - 5

failed_attempts:
simp [c]
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₁ : 2 * m - 2 - v m S k ≤ 2 * m - 2 := by
          have h₂ : v m S k ≥ 0 := by
            simp [v]
            <;>
            omega
          omega
        omega
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₁ : v m S k ≥ 0 := by
          simp [v]
          <;>
          omega
        omega
      })

have h₂ : c k = 0 := by
        simp [c]
      simp [h₂]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₃ : v S k ≥ 0 := by
            sorry
          omega
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₃ : 2 * m - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * m - 5 := by
            omega
          omega
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₃ : v S k ≤ 2 := by
            sorry
          omega
        })
    exact h₁
  trivial

obtain ⟨S, hS, hS'⟩ := hm.2
      have h₄ : S.length < 2 * m - 4 := hS'
      have h₅ : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5 := by
        have h₆ : 2 * m - 4 > 0 := by
          have h₇ : 4 < m := hm.1
          have h₈ : 2 * m > 8 := by linarith
          omega
        omega
      exact ⟨S, hS, h₅⟩
    -- Show that for all n < m, ¬(4 < n ∧ ∃ (S : List (Call n)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length < 2 * n - 4).
    have h₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n < m → ¬(4 < n ∧ ∃ (S : List (Call n)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length < 2 * n - 4) := by
      intro n hn
      have h₅ : ¬(4 < n ∧ ∃ (S : List (Call n)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length < 2 * n - 4) := by
        have h₆ : ¬(4 < n ∧ (∃ (S : List (Call n)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length < 2 * n - 4)) := hm' n hn
        tauto
      exact h₅
    -- Combine the results to get the final form.
    exact ⟨h₃, h₄⟩
  
  -- Now, we use the main result to derive a contradiction.
  obtain ⟨m, hm₁, ⟨S, hS_exp, hS_len⟩, hm₂⟩ := h_main
  have h₁ : 4 < m := hm₁
  have h₂ : ∃ (S : List (Call m)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5 := ⟨S, hS_exp, hS_len⟩
  have h₃ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n < m → ¬(4 < n ∧ ∃ (S : List (Call n)), allExpert (after S) ∧ S.length < 2 * n - 4) := hm₂
  
  -- The rest of the proof would involve showing that the existence of such an m leads to a contradiction.

  <;>

  (try omega) <;>
  (try linarith)
